detailedDescription: The Seagate BarraCuda 1TB 7200RPM HDD provides reliable bulk storage with 210MB/s transfer speeds. Featuring 256MB cache and advanced formatting technology, this drive is ideal for desktop PCs, NAS systems, and backup solutions.
additionalSpecs: 1TB Capacity | 7200RPM | 256MB Cache | SATA 6Gb/s Interface | 210MB/s Transfer Speed | 2M Hours MTBF | Acoustic Magic Technology
